systems.name: BCMA (Bar Code Medication Administration)
systems.description: Barcode-driven medication administration at bedside. Scans patient wristband + med unit dose, validates 5 rights, records administration in VistA.

surfaces.name: Medication Administration Log
surfaces.description: Real-time log of all medication administrations for a patient. Shows scheduled, PRN, and continuous meds with scan results.
surfaces.notes: eMAR panel scaffolded in Phase 85. PSB RPCs not yet wired -- sandbox lacks BCMA config.

surfaces.name: Virtual Due List (VDL)
surfaces.description: Shows all medications currently due or overdue for a ward/team. Drives nurse workflow.
surfaces.notes: VDL is the primary nurse workflow driver. Needs ward/team context from ADT.

surfaces.name: Medication Tab (Inpatient)
surfaces.description: Detailed medication view showing active orders, last admin times, and PRN effectiveness.

surfaces.name: Barcode Scanning Workflow
surfaces.description: Scan patient wristband, scan medication, validate match, record administration.
surfaces.notes: Requires device integration (barcode scanner) -- Phase 538 imaging capture may provide pattern.

surfaces.name: IV Bag Tracking
surfaces.description: Track IV solutions from pharmacy to bedside. Scan bag, record hang/stop times.

systems.name: VistA Imaging (VI / VIX)
systems.description: Enterprise imaging display and capture. Includes clinical display, DICOM viewer, image capture, and teleradiology via VIX (VistA Imaging Exchange).

surfaces.name: Clinical Image Display
surfaces.description: View DICOM and non-DICOM clinical images associated with patient record. Integrated into CPRS.
surfaces.notes: Imaging panel uses Orthanc/DICOMweb proxy, not MAG RPCs directly. VIX not implemented.

surfaces.name: DICOM Viewer (OHIF)
surfaces.description: Full diagnostic-quality DICOM viewer with MPR, measurements, annotations.
surfaces.notes: OHIF viewer integrated via Docker. Fork-first per meta-rules.

surfaces.name: Image Capture (SIC-equivalent)
surfaces.description: Capture clinical images from scanner, camera, or document feeder. Associate with TIU note or order.
surfaces.notes: Target for Phase 538 (P8: Imaging Capture + Attach).

surfaces.name: Imaging Worklist
surfaces.description: Radiologist reading worklist with study status, priority, and assignment.
surfaces.notes: In-memory worklist store (Phase 23). PG-backed as of Phase 528.

surfaces.name: DICOM Device Registry
surfaces.description: Manage DICOM AE Titles, modality worklist, and C-ECHO verification.

surfaces.name: Teleradiology (VIX)
surfaces.description: Cross-facility image sharing via VistA Imaging Exchange. Enables remote reading.

systems.name: IVS / SIC (Imaging Viewing Solution / Scanned Image Capture)
systems.description: Document scanning and clinical image capture for non-DICOM content. Replaces legacy SIC with IVS.

surfaces.name: Document Scanning
surfaces.description: Scan paper documents (consult reports, outside records) into VistA Imaging.
surfaces.notes: Target for Phase 538 (P8: Imaging Capture + Attach).

surfaces.name: Clinical Photo Capture
surfaces.description: Capture wound photos, dermatology images, progress photos via webcam or mobile device.

surfaces.name: Batch Document Import
surfaces.description: Bulk import of scanned documents with metadata mapping.

systems.name: MHA (Mental Health Assistant)
systems.description: Standardized mental health screening instruments (PHQ-9, GAD-7, PCL-5, AUDIT-C, Columbia Suicide Severity). Uses LForms/NLM questionnaire engine.

surfaces.name: Instrument Administration
surfaces.description: Administer standardized instruments to patients. Auto-score and store results.
surfaces.notes: Target for Phase 535 (P5: MHA v1 LForms).

surfaces.name: PHQ-9 Depression Screen
surfaces.description: Patient Health Questionnaire-9. Primary depression screening instrument.

surfaces.name: GAD-7 Anxiety Screen
surfaces.description: Generalized Anxiety Disorder 7-item scale.

surfaces.name: PCL-5 PTSD Screen
surfaces.description: PTSD Checklist for DSM-5. 20-item self-report measure.

surfaces.name: Columbia Suicide Severity Rating
surfaces.description: Columbia Suicide Severity Rating Scale (C-SSRS). Mandated for all MH encounters.

surfaces.name: AUDIT-C Alcohol Screen
surfaces.description: Alcohol Use Disorders Identification Test - Consumption.

surfaces.name: Instrument Results History
surfaces.description: View historical scores and trend lines for all administered instruments.

surfaces.name: MHA to TIU Note Writeback
surfaces.description: Auto-generate TIU progress note from completed instrument with scores embedded.
surfaces.notes: Target for Phase 536 (P6: MHA VistA Writeback).

systems.name: VSE / VS GUI (VistA Scheduling Enhancement)
systems.description: Appointment scheduling, check-in, recall, wait list management. VSE is the modernized scheduling GUI replacing legacy SD options.

surfaces.name: Appointment Book / Grid View
surfaces.description: Visual grid of clinic slots. Drag-and-drop appointment scheduling.
surfaces.notes: SDES RPCs callable but slots empty without ZVESDSEED.m. Phase 539 targets parity.

surfaces.name: Patient Check-In
surfaces.description: Mark patient as arrived, update insurance, collect copay.

surfaces.name: Recall/Reminder Management
surfaces.description: Schedule future recall dates. Auto-generate reminder letters.

surfaces.name: Wait List Management
surfaces.description: Manage electronic wait lists (EWL) for clinic appointments.

surfaces.name: Clinic Profile Setup
surfaces.description: Configure clinic hours, slot templates, provider assignments, special instructions.

surfaces.name: Resource/Provider View
surfaces.description: View and manage schedules by provider, room, or equipment.

systems.name: CPRS (Computerized Patient Record System)
systems.description: Primary clinician workstation. Cover sheet, notes, orders, consults, surgery, labs, imaging integration.

surfaces.name: Cover Sheet
surfaces.description: Patient summary with active problems, allergies, meds, vitals, recent labs, orders, appointments.

surfaces.name: Problem List
surfaces.description: Active/inactive problem list with ICD-10 coding. Add, edit, inactivate problems.

surfaces.name: Allergies
surfaces.description: Allergy/adverse reaction list. Enter new allergy with reactant, symptoms, severity.

surfaces.name: Vitals
surfaces.description: Enter and view vital signs (T, P, R, BP, SpO2, pain, height, weight).

surfaces.name: TIU Notes
surfaces.description: Progress notes, consult results, discharge summaries. Create, edit, sign, co-sign.

surfaces.name: Orders (CPOE)
surfaces.description: Computerized provider order entry. Meds, labs, imaging, consults, diets, nursing.

surfaces.name: Consults
surfaces.description: Request, track, and complete consults. Inter-facility consult forwarding.

surfaces.name: Lab Results
surfaces.description: View lab results with cumulative and graph views. Micro, pathology, blood bank.

surfaces.name: Reports
surfaces.description: Clinical reports (health summary, OE/RR, radiology, surgical, pathology).

surfaces.name: Surgery
surfaces.description: Surgical case listing, operative reports, anesthesia records.

surfaces.name: Notifications / Inbox
surfaces.description: Clinician notification inbox. Flagged orders, unsigned notes, consult results.

surfaces.name: Patient Selection / Search
surfaces.description: Search by name, SSN, or select from team/ward patient lists.

surfaces.name: Medications Tab
surfaces.description: View active/recent/all medications grouped by inpatient, outpatient, non-VA. Details include sig, refills, last fill date.
surfaces.notes: MedsPanel wired in Phase 15. ORWPS ACTIVE multi-line grouping parsed correctly (BUG-028).

surfaces.name: Discharge Summary
surfaces.description: Free-text discharge summary linked to admission. TIU document type = Discharge Summary.
surfaces.notes: Shares TIU infrastructure with notes tab. D/C Summary is a TIU document class.

surfaces.name: Patient Postings / Flags
surfaces.description: Crisis notes, clinical warnings, advance directives displayed as banner bar items in CPRS.
surfaces.notes: Patient postings display crisis notes and advance directives in CPRS header bar.

surfaces.name: Flagged Patient List
surfaces.description: Provider tool to view patients flagged for behavioral, missing, or identity alerts.
surfaces.notes: Patient record flag display in CPRS selection list + cover sheet.

surfaces.name: Notifications / Alerts
surfaces.description: Inbox-style alerts for lab results, order flags, consult results, imaging results requiring action.
surfaces.notes: Inbox panel in Phase 16. ORWORB RPCs available but not yet wired to VistA notifications.

systems.name: Clinical Procedures (CP/MD)
systems.description: Gateway for device-acquired clinical data (EKG, spirometry, holter, sleep studies). Acquires data from devices, associates with patient/order, stores in VistA.

surfaces.name: Data Acquisition
surfaces.description: Acquire clinical data from medical devices (EKG machines, spirometers, holter recorders).
surfaces.notes: Target for Phase 537 (P7: Clinical Procedures v1).

surfaces.name: Procedure Worklist
surfaces.description: List of pending procedures to be performed. Organized by clinic, date, instrument.

surfaces.name: Results Review & Interpretation
surfaces.description: Review acquired EKG tracings, PFT results. Add clinician interpretation.

surfaces.name: Instrument Configuration
surfaces.description: Configure device connections, data formats, and mapping to VistA procedures.

systems.name: JLV (Joint Longitudinal Viewer)
systems.description: Cross-facility, cross-agency (VA+DoD) longitudinal patient record viewer. Read-only. Shows data from VistA, CHCS, MHS Genesis, community care.

surfaces.name: Clinical Timeline
surfaces.description: Chronological view of all clinical events across facilities.
surfaces.notes: Target for Phase 540 (P10: JLV Longitudinal Viewer). CPRS remote-data-viewer page exists.

surfaces.name: Cross-Facility Documents
surfaces.description: View clinical documents from remote VA facilities and DoD.

surfaces.name: Longitudinal Medication Summary
surfaces.description: Unified medication list across all facilities and pharmacies.

surfaces.name: Aggregated Lab Results
surfaces.description: Combined lab results from all facilities with trend graphing.

surfaces.name: Community Care Records
surfaces.description: View records from non-VA community care providers via FHIR/C-CDA.

systems.name: VistAWeb
systems.description: Web-based read-only clinical viewer. Lighter-weight alternative to CPRS for remote data access.

surfaces.name: Patient Summary View
surfaces.description: Read-only patient summary accessible from any browser.
surfaces.notes: VistA-Evolved subsumes VistAWeb entirely via the web CPRS UI.

surfaces.name: Remote Data Access
surfaces.description: View clinical data from other VA facilities via VistaLink/HDR.

systems.name: CDSP (Clinical Decision Support Platform)
systems.description: VA's clinical decision support engine. Delivers evidence-based alerts, reminders, and order checks.

surfaces.name: Order Checks
surfaces.description: Drug-drug, drug-allergy, duplicate order checks during CPOE.
surfaces.notes: Order check enhancement scaffolded in Phase 434.

surfaces.name: Clinical Reminders
surfaces.description: Preventive care reminders (screenings, immunizations, follow-ups).

systems.name: CISS (Clinical Information Support System)
systems.description: Clinical information support and reporting system. Provides dashboards and population health views.

surfaces.name: Population Health Dashboard
surfaces.description: Aggregate views of clinical quality measures across patient populations.

systems.name: VA Direct Messaging
systems.description: Secure health information exchange using Direct protocol (S/MIME + XDR).

surfaces.name: Direct Secure Messaging
surfaces.description: Send/receive encrypted clinical messages to external providers via Direct addresses.

systems.name: E-Signature Service
systems.description: Electronic signature verification for order signing, note signing, and co-signing.

surfaces.name: Order Electronic Signature
surfaces.description: Sign orders with electronic signature code. Required for all CPOE actions.

surfaces.name: Note Electronic Signature
surfaces.description: Sign TIU notes and addenda.

systems.name: HINGE (Health Information National Gateway Exchange)
systems.description: National health information exchange gateway for VA. Connects to eHealth Exchange, Carequality, CommonWell.

surfaces.name: Patient Discovery / Query
surfaces.description: Find patient records across national HIE networks.

surfaces.name: Document Retrieve
surfaces.description: Retrieve C-CDA documents from external HIEs.

systems.name: HWSC (Health Web Services Client)
systems.description: RESTful web services client for VA. FHIR client, HL7v2 gateway, API management.

surfaces.name: FHIR R4 Gateway
surfaces.description: SMART on FHIR R4 endpoint exposing VistA data as FHIR resources.
surfaces.notes: FHIR R4 gateway scaffolded in Phase 178. SMART-on-FHIR in Phase 195.

systems.name: VA Lighthouse (API Platform)
systems.description: VA's public-facing API platform. Provides OAuth2-protected FHIR APIs for third-party apps.

surfaces.name: Health API (Patient-facing)
surfaces.description: Patient-authorized access to their health data (Blue Button equivalent).

surfaces.name: Provider Directory API
surfaces.description: Provider search and directory services for scheduling and referrals.

systems.name: VES (Veteran Enrollment System)
systems.description: Enrollment, eligibility, and means test processing. Determines veteran benefit eligibility.

surfaces.name: Enrollment Processing
surfaces.description: Process new enrollment applications and priority group assignments.

surfaces.name: Eligibility Verification
surfaces.description: Real-time eligibility verification for clinical encounters.

systems.name: MHV (My HealtheVet)
systems.description: Veteran-facing patient portal. Secure messaging, Rx refills, appointment viewing, Blue Button health records.

surfaces.name: Secure Messaging
surfaces.description: Patient-to-provider asynchronous messaging.

surfaces.name: Prescription Refill Requests
surfaces.description: Patients request Rx refills online. Routed to pharmacy.

surfaces.name: Appointment View/Request
surfaces.description: View upcoming appointments and request new ones.

surfaces.name: Blue Button Health Records
surfaces.description: Download complete health record as PDF or C-CDA.

systems.name: VODA (VistA Object Display Application)
systems.description: Object-based clinical data display. Provides structured views of VistA data objects.

surfaces.name: Clinical Object Viewer
surfaces.description: Structured display of clinical data objects (problems, allergies, vitals, etc.).
surfaces.notes: VistA-Evolved CPRS replica effectively replaces VODA functionality.

systems.name: NUMI (Nursing Unit Management Indicators)
systems.description: Nursing workload and staffing indicators. Acuity-based staffing recommendations.

surfaces.name: Nurse Staffing Dashboard
surfaces.description: Unit-level staffing vs acuity display. Nurse-to-patient ratios.

systems.name: PATS (Patient Advocate Tracking System)
systems.description: Track patient complaints, compliments, and congressional inquiries.

surfaces.name: Complaint/Issue Tracking
surfaces.description: Log and track patient complaints through resolution.

systems.name: Person Services (MPI/PSIM)
systems.description: Master Patient Index and Person Service Identity Management. National patient matching and ICN assignment.

surfaces.name: Patient Identity Matching
surfaces.description: Match patients across facilities using MPI. Assign/verify ICN.

systems.name: VistA Audit Solution
systems.description: Audit trail management. Track all user actions in VistA for compliance and security.

surfaces.name: Audit Trail Viewer
surfaces.description: View and search audit logs for user actions, data access, and changes.

systems.name: ADT (Admission/Discharge/Transfer)
systems.description: Inpatient bed management, census, admission/discharge/transfer processing.

surfaces.name: Bed Board
surfaces.description: Visual bed management showing current census, pending admissions, available beds.

surfaces.name: Ward Census
surfaces.description: Current inpatient census by ward/team with patient details.

surfaces.name: Admit/Discharge/Transfer Processing
surfaces.description: Process new admissions, discharges, and inter-ward transfers.
surfaces.notes: ADT writeback scaffolded in Phase 431/483.
